description_long: This sculpture features a group of human figures and a dog, rendered in a rough, textured stone or concrete material. The figures appear to be interacting, with one central figure mounted on a raised platform or animal, possibly a donkey, while others stand or walk beside. The forms are stylized and somewhat abstract, with simplified facial and body features, giving the piece a rustic, communal feel. The base is a rectangular slab, supporting both the figures and a block-like structure that may represent a seat or pedestal. The surface is uneven and weathered, suggesting age or intentional artistic texture. The overall composition evokes a narrative scene, possibly referencing a historical or folkloric event.
description: A rough-textured stone sculpture depicting several human figures and a dog, arranged on a rectangular base in a communal scene.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the sculpture and the rectangular base, with little detail of the figures visible.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the abstracted backs of the figures and the blocky base, with the dog and human forms discernible in silhouette.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the sculpture's thinness and the rectangular base, with minimal figure detail.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the detailed faces and bodies of the human figures and the dog, clearly showing the narrative scene.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures and a dog in a communal scene
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is placed on a flat, stone-like surface, suggesting an outdoor or public urban setting.
